gettingStarted.note: These settings can be changed later

library.title: Anime Library
library.description: Choose the folder where your anime files are stored. This is where Seanime will scan your collection.
library.pathHelp: Select the main folder containing your anime collection. You can add more folders later.

player.title: Video Player
player.description: Configure your preferred external media player for watching anime and automatic progress tracking.
player.playerArgsHelp: Additional arguments to pass to the player
player.denshiNotice: Seanime Denshi includes a built-in media player that is enabled by default. You can still configure an external player.
player.mpvHelp: MPV is recommended for better subtitle rendering and torrent streaming.
player.iinaHelp: Both MPV and IINA are recommended for macOS.
player.mpvInstallNote: On Windows, install MPV easily using Scoop or Chocolatey. On macOS, install MPV using Homebrew.
player.iinaAlert: For IINA to work correctly with Seanime, make sure Quit after all windows are closed is checked and Keep window open after playback finishes is unchecked in your IINA general settings.

torrents.title: Downloads
torrents.description: Configure your torrent client for downloading.
torrents.clientHelp: Client used to download anime torrents

debrid.title: Debrid Service
debrid.description: Debrid services offer faster downloads and instant cloud streaming.
debrid.apiKeyHelp: The API key provided by the Debrid service.

features.title: Additional Features
features.description: Choose which additional features you would like to enable. You can enable or disable them later in settings.
features.anilistHelp: Sync your anime and manga progress with AniList
features.discordHelp: Show what you're watching on Discord
features.notificationsHelp: Get notified about new episodes and updates

items.torrentStreamingDesc: Stream torrents without waiting for them to download
items.adultContentDesc: Show adult content in library and search
items.richPresenceDesc: Show what you're watching on Discord
items.transcodingDesc: Stream downloaded files to other devices
